title: Rexo repository configuration schema
description: Schema for repo.json, the main Rexo repository runtime configuration file.

$schema.description: Schema URI/path used by editors and validation. Use the canonical remote URL for shared repositories.

schemaVersion.description: Schema contract version for this config file. Currently only 1.0 is supported.

name.description: Human-friendly repository/runtime name shown in command output.

description.description: Optional longer description of the repository runtime.

version.description: Optional static version string. Most repositories should prefer the versioning section instead.

extends.description: Reserved for future configuration composition/merge support.

commands.description: Command map exposed by rx. Keys are command names and values define arguments, options, and steps.

aliases.description: Simple command aliases. Key is alias name, value is the target command string.

versioning.description: Version provider configuration used by builtin:resolve-version.

artifacts.description: Artifact definitions used by builtin:build-artifacts, builtin:tag-artifacts, and builtin:push-artifacts.

runtime.description: Cross-cutting runtime policy configuration for output and push behavior.

tests.description: Test execution configuration used by builtin:test.

analysis.description: Static analysis configuration used by builtin:analyze.

repoCommand.description: Reusable command definition for both repository and policy commands.

description.description: Human-readable command summary used in help/list output.

args.description: Positional argument declarations keyed by argument name.

options.description: Named option declarations keyed by option name.

steps.description: Ordered execution steps that implement the command.

maxParallel.description: Maximum concurrent step execution when parallel groups are used.

argConfig.description: Configuration for a positional command argument.

required.description: Whether this positional argument must be supplied by the caller.

description.description: Help text shown for the argument.

optionConfig.description: Configuration for a named command option.

default.description: Default value used when the caller does not provide this option.

allowed.description: Optional allowed values list enforced at runtime.

step.description: Single executable unit in a command pipeline. Exactly one of run, uses, or command must be set.

id.description: Stable step identifier for logging, dependency wiring, and output references.

command.description: Invokes another configured command by name.

uses.description: Invokes a built-in primitive (for example builtin:resolve-version).

when.description: Conditional expression that controls whether the step runs.

with.description: String key/value inputs passed to the selected built-in or command.

description.description: Optional step summary shown in plan/log output.

continueOnError.description: Continue executing subsequent steps when this step fails.

parallel.description: Marks the step as eligible for parallel scheduling with other independent steps.

dependsOn.description: List of step ids that must complete before this step executes.

outputPattern.description: Regex pattern used by compatible steps to capture structured output values.

outputFile.description: Path to an output file consumed by compatible steps for captured outputs.

provider.description: Version provider to use. 'auto' (default) detects the right provider from config file evidence: version.json/nbgv.json → nbgv; GitVersion.yml → gitversion; .minverrc → minver; .git present → git; otherwise → fixed.

fallback.description: Version string used when the provider cannot resolve a version (e.g. no tags yet).

settings.description: Provider-specific settings. Common keys: variable (env), tagPrefix/minimumMajorMinor (minver). Docker fallback keys (all providers except fixed/env/git): useDocker (default true — set false to disable), dockerImage (override the default Docker image).

artifact.description: Artifact declaration. Choose docker, nuget, or a custom provider type.

name.description: Logical artifact name used in logs and manifests. When omitted, falls back to the root config name.

settings.description: Provider-specific docker build, tag, and push settings.

name.description: Logical artifact name used in logs and manifests. When omitted, falls back to the root config name.

genericArtifact.description: Fallback artifact shape for custom providers not explicitly modeled in this schema.

name.description: Logical artifact name used in logs and manifests. When omitted, falls back to the root config name.

settings.description: Provider-specific arbitrary settings for custom artifact providers.

stringOrStringArray.description: Convenience type that accepts either a single string value or a string array.

tagKindOrTagKindArray.description: One Docker tag strategy kind or a list of tag strategy kinds.

buildArgValue.description: Supported primitive value for a single Docker build argument.

buildArgsValue.description: Accepted forms for Docker build arguments: inline string, key/value object, or list.

secretSpec.description: Docker build secret source. Provide either env or file.

env.description: Environment variable name that contains the secret value.

file.description: Path to a file containing the secret value.

aliasesRule.description: Conditional docker alias tag rule applied to the current branch name.

match.description: Branch match expression (wildcard or regex:... syntax).

template.description: Alias template supporting tokens such as $BRANCH and capture groups like $1.

dockerStage.description: Named multi-stage docker build configuration entry.

output.description: Build output destination(s) for this stage.

runner.description: Docker runner to use for this stage (build, buildx, or auto-detect).

platform.description: Target platform for the stage (for example linux/amd64).

dockerArtifactSettings.description: Detailed docker provider settings covering image naming, build, tagging, aliases, and push behavior.

image.description: Final docker image repository name. If omitted, the artifact name is used.

runner.description: Docker command flavor to use for build operations.

platform.description: Build platform passed to docker via --platform.

buildOutput.description: Build output option(s) passed to docker --output.

registry.description: Legacy shorthand for target registry host. Prefer target.registry.

repository.description: Legacy shorthand for target repository path. Prefer target.repository.

target.description: Target registry/repository destination used to compose the image name.

registry.description: Registry host, for example ghcr.io or myregistry.example.com:5000.

loginRegistry.description: Registry host used for docker login when different from target registry.

login.description: Login override settings for docker authentication.

cleanupLocal.description: Legacy cleanup switch. true/false or auto (auto cleans up in CI). Prefer cleanup.local.

local.description: Controls local image cleanup after build: true, false, or auto.

pushEnabled.description: Legacy push enable flag. Prefer push.enabled.

pushBranches.description: Legacy push branch allow-list. Prefer push.branches.

denyNonPublicPush.description: Legacy switch to prevent pushes from non-public build classifications. Prefer push.denyNonPublicPush.

push.description: Push policy for this docker artifact.

enabled.description: Enables docker push for this artifact.

branches.description: Allowed branch patterns for pushing this artifact.

branchesShortcut.description: Shortcut CSV/string form for branches; merged with push.branches.

denyNonPublicPush.description: Blocks push when build classification resolves to non-public.

latest.description: Legacy switch to emit latest tag. Prefer tags.latest via tag policy settings.

tags.description: Tag strategy names (for example full, majorMinor, major, branch, sha) or a custom list.

publicBuild.description: Legacy explicit build classification as public/non-public. Prefer build.public.

public.description: When set, forces public/non-public build classification.

publicBranches.description: Legacy branch patterns classified as public builds. Prefer classification.publicBranches.

nonPublicBranches.description: Legacy branch patterns classified as non-public builds. Prefer classification.nonPublicBranches.

publicBranches.description: Branch patterns treated as public builds.

nonPublicBranches.description: Branch patterns treated as non-public builds.

tagPolicy.description: Default tag kinds applied by build classification when explicit tags are not set.

nonPublicMode.description: Optional mode override for non-public tagging behavior.

aliases.description: Additional human-friendly alias tags generated from branch names.

branch.description: Emit alias from raw branch name.

sanitizedBranch.description: Emit alias from slug/sanitized branch name.

sanitize.description: Sanitize alias output strings by default.

nonPublicPrefix.description: Prefix used when build classification is non-public.

rules.description: Ordered alias mapping rules; first matching rule is applied.

stages.description: Named build stage definitions for multi-stage Dockerfile workflows.

stageFallback.description: When true, run a final full build after configured stages to produce final tags.

nugetArtifactSettings.description: Settings for dotnet pack and dotnet nuget push operations.

output.description: Package output directory for generated .nupkg files.

source.description: NuGet source/feed URL or name used for push.

apiKeyEnv.description: Environment variable name containing the NuGet API key.

artifactSettingValue.description: Recursive value type for arbitrary custom artifact settings.

settingValue.description: Allowed primitive/array value types for generic settings maps.

enabled.description: Enable or disable test execution for builtin:test.

projects.description: Optional project globs passed to dotnet test; when omitted, dotnet test runs from the repository root.

resultsOutput.description: Results directory for TRX output. When omitted, defaults to <runtime.output.root>/tests.

coverageOutput.description: Directory for XPlat Code Coverage output. Coverage collection is enabled when this is set.

collectCoverage.description: Reserved compatibility flag. Coverage behavior is driven by coverageOutput.

emitRuntimeFiles.description: Controls whether runtime-generated files (for example artifact manifest files) are written.

output.description: Runtime output controls applied across tests, analysis, and artifact runtime files.

push.description: Global push policy merged with per-artifact push overrides.

noPushInPullRequest.description: Rejects push when CI context indicates a pull request build.

requireCleanWorkingTree.description: Rejects push when the git working tree has uncommitted changes.

branches.description: Allowed branch patterns for push. Empty means no branch restriction.

enabled.description: Enable or disable analysis execution for builtin:analyze.

failOnIssues.description: Fail the command when analysis tools report issues.

tools.description: Optional additional analysis tool commands to execute after dotnet format.

configuration.description: Analysis output/configuration path. If omitted, SARIF defaults to <runtime.output.root>/analysis.sarif.json.
